design_philosophy: Bold, brutal, confident, Indian street-food meets premium pitch deck. Minimal text, maximum visual impact. No fluff.

cursor.behavior: animated chai cup with steam trail that follows mouse pointer. Hides default cursor.
cursor.implementation: framer-motion for smooth spring physics on x/y coordinates. Hidden on mobile.

scroll_animations.hero_typography: word-by-word stagger drops from top (y: -100%, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1), duration: 0.8s, ease: 'power4.out', stagger: 0.1s
scroll_animations.text_reveals: lines mask-up reveal on scroll into view
scroll_animations.counters: GSAP animate value from 0 to target on scroll, duration 2s, ease: 'expo.out'

cards.style: solid flat rectangular, #FFFFFF background, 2px solid #0A0A0A borders, sharp corners (rounded-none).
cards.layout: horizontal scroll carousel on desktop using GSAP ScrollTrigger pinning, vertical stack on mobile

map_pins.animation: drop in from top, then pulsing ripple effect (scale and opacity fade out) repeatedly

sections.name: Loading Screen
sections.layout: Fixed fullscreen overlay, white bg, center content, z-50
sections.elements: SVG chai cup illustration, steam animation. Text: 'Brewing the hottest proposal Bhai Ki Chai has ever tasted' (Manrope, uppercase, tracking-widest). Cup tips at end to transition out.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-end pb-20 pt-32
sections.elements: Massive '75,000 CHAI LOVERS.' (Anton, #FF6B00), 'One festival. Three nights. Hyderabad.' (Manrope, Black). 'And this is just the beginning.' (Manrope, small, text-gray-500).

sections.name: The One Line
sections.layout: Full width, heavy text block, py-32 md:py-48
sections.elements: 'YOUR NEXT 1000 FRANCHISE ENQUIRIES ARE SITTING IN ONE STADIUM. THIS OCTOBER.' in Anton, full bleed text responsive sizing.

sections.name: The Audience Truth
sections.layout: Grid split: Left large stat, Right context. py-24
sections.elements: 75,000+ stat counter. Context about corporate audience, IT professionals, FOCO investor pitch.

sections.name: The FOCO Moment
sections.elements: Massive typography 'FRANCHISE OWNED. COMPANY OPERATED. ZERO HEADACHE. PURE RETURNS.' (Anton). Solid saffron background.

sections.name: The Map
sections.elements: Custom SVG India map. Pins drop in sequence: Hyderabad first (Gold), then others (Orange).

sections.name: The Numbers
sections.layout: Bento grid or multi-column layout, py-24

sections.name: The Competitor Reality
sections.elements: Left: Faded grey bg, grey text 'no other chai brand'. Right: Bold orange bg, black text 'Bhai Ki Chai'.

sections.name: What Bhai Ki Chai Gets
sections.elements: 8 Brutalist cards with sharp borders. Content: Experience Zone, Franchise Counter, LED Screens, Wristbands, etc.

sections.name: The Chai Conversation
sections.layout: Centred, lots of negative space, py-40
sections.elements: Playfair Display italic: 'Every great business deal in India started over a cup of chai'

sections.name: The Ask
sections.elements: Massive text 'ONE SLOT. ONE CITY TO START. ONE COUNTRY TO CONQUER. ARE YOU IN?' (Anton)

sections.name: Footer
sections.elements: GFF + Bhai Ki Chai logos. October 9-11, 2026 Gachibowli Stadium. Habeeb Ali contact info.

images.description: Large dark crowd of people to represent 75,000 festival goers (Optional usage as subtle bg texture)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Anton', 'Manrope', and 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts in the frontend.
Ensure all frontend files use .js / .jsx extensions.
Implement the custom animated chai cursor using framer-motion and a global mouse position listener.
For horizontal scrolling in section 9, use GSAP ScrollTrigger pin feature to lock the container and scroll the cards horizontally.
Implement the animated SVG India map with framer-motion or GSAP. The map should be a valid SVG path of India. Add circular SVG elements as pins with CSS ripple animations.
Do NOT add any interactive CTA buttons like 'Download' or 'Contact'. The design is a static read-only presentation pitch.
Use exact Tailwind colors for #FF6B00 (Saffron), #0A0A0A (Black) and #B8960A (Gold).
Add data-testid attributes to all major sections and any animated numeric counters (e.g. data-testid="hero-section", data-testid="counter-75000").
All text content across the sections must reflect a 'bold, brutal, confident' style, emphasizing massive typography logic.
